situation: audit-2026-07-08-042 derived_fixes PA-AUD-M-001 pending. xiaozhi_server.py:88 _on_hello accepts device-supplied sample_rate without range validation. Malicious device can send sample_rate=999999999 → frame_size=int(999999999*0.06)=59999999 at line 128 opus decode → ~120MB allocation per frame → memory-exhaustion DoS. Legit xiaozhi firmware uses 16kHz mono 60ms.
action: Clamp audio_params in _on_hello to sane ranges: sample_rate 8000-48000 Hz, channels 1-2, frame_duration 10-120ms. Log warning when clamped. Try/except around int() conversion to handle non-numeric input gracefully. Direct-edit escape hatch used (cp-guard triggered because opt-xiaozhi-1783385638 already has unmerged H-002 fix diverging from main).
outcome_evidence: Commit db77f15 on auto/opt-xiaozhi-1783385638 pushed to origin. git diff shows +21/-3 lines adding clamp logic with try/except and log.warning. Branch HEAD=db77f15 stacked on prior H-002 fix 1a158ad.
next_suggestion: Next derived_fix: PA-AUD-M-002 (xiaozhi_server.py:141 utterance discard threshold uses module SAMPLE_RATE not session self.sample_rate — wrong discard at non-16k rates). After that M-003 proactive log injection, then L-001/L-002.

audit_findings.finding: PA-AUD-M-001: audio_params sample_rate accepted without range validation → DoS via excessive opus frame_size allocation
audit_findings.remediation: Clamp sample_rate to 8000-48000, channels to 1-2, frame_duration to 10-120; log warning on clamp
